---
name: Website Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement or new feature for the ceph.io website
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement, website
assignees: ""
---

> [!IMPORTANT]
> This repository is for issues related to the ceph.io website only.
>
> For Ceph product bugs, cluster issues, performance problems, RADOS/RGW/CephFS issues, or other technical Ceph platform problems, please use the official tracker:
>
> https://tracker.ceph.com/

## Feature Summary

Provide a short summary of the feature or improvement.

---

## Problem Statement

Describe the problem this feature would solve or the motivation behind it.

---

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution or feature you would like to see implemented.

---

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or features you have considered.

---

## Affected Area(s)

Select any relevant areas:

- [ ] Homepage
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Blog
- [ ] Navigation
- [ ] Search
- [ ] Accessibility
- [ ] Design / UI
- [ ] Performance
- [ ] Developer Experience
- [ ] Other

---

## Additional Context

Add any other context, references, mockups, or screenshots here.
